subject: Postdoctoral Fellow Position for Structural Neuropharmacology at              CSHL
body:
Postdoctoral Fellow Position for Structural Neuropharmacology 

Cold Spring Harbor Laboratory, New York, USA

The Furukawa lab at Cold Spring Harbor Laboratory (CSHL) has a postdoctoral fellow position opening for a scientist with a strong background in structural biology and biochemistry. We work on ion channels and membrane protein complexes involved in neurobiology of learning/memory, neurological disease/disorder, and neuron-cancer interfaces. We implement a combined approach that includes cryo-EM, x-ray crystallography, molecular dynamics, electrophysiology (patch-clamp, slice physiology, lipid bilayer), protein engineering, and cellular imaging to address our questions. 

CSHL is equipped with a Titan-KRIOS electron microscope/K3 direct electron detector and a Talos L120C microscope. It has an in-house x-ray generator/detector and convenient access to the NSLS-II synchrotron beamlines (AMX and FMX). CSHL has solid core facilities including antibody production/engineering, cellular imaging, CRISPR/RNAi, single-cell sequencing, etc. CSHL is also equipped with a sufficient resource for conducting CPU- and GPU-based computation for cryo-EM and molecular dynamics. We offer a unique training environment for research and career development. In addition, the CSHL Meetings and Courses program (including Cryo-EM, X-ray crystallography, Electrophysiology, Synthetic biology, etc) provides an opportunity to be exposed to cutting-edge science and to interact with a broad range of researchers. Please visit http://furukawalab.labsites.cshl.edu/ for more details on research, publication, mentoring/lab culture, and training track record of the alumni members before you apply. 

For this search, we prioritize scientists with strong backgrounds in biochemistry, cryo-EM, and x-ray crystallography. Experience in either cryo-EM or x-ray crystallography is desired but not required if you have other strengths. A qualified applicant should hold a Ph.D. or expect to hold a Ph.D. within or around 1 yr in the area of biochemistry, structural biology, biophysics, etc. 

Please send a CV and a cover letter briefly describing current research and future research interests in our lab directly to Hiro Furukawa at furukawa@cshl.edu.
